branch_context.rationale: PRD #002 is local-only skill folder + scripts (no production code, no shipping path). Status.json declares parent as refactor/agent-loop-v1. PRD #001 was executed directly on this branch under the same pattern. No feature/* branch from main. No GitHub task PRs. Each wave commits directly to refactor/agent-loop-v1.
